title: Spicy Australian-Style Potato Pancakes
description: A fusion of Indian flavors with Australian potato pancakes, adding a spicy kick.
instructions: Grate the potatoes and squeeze out excess moisture.
In a large bowl, combine the grated potatoes, flour, chana masala, ginger, and egg.
Mix well to form a thick batter.
Heat a non-stick pan or griddle with a small amount of oil over medium heat.
Drop the batter by spoonfuls onto the pan, making sure not to overcrowd.
Cook the pancakes for 3-4 minutes on each side or until golden brown.
Serve hot with a squeeze of lime juice and garnished with chopped cilantro.
